overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a sunlit Mediterranean-style rooftop terrace and adjacent interior spaces. The character ascends stone stairs, walks through an outdoor dining area with lake views, then enters a richly decorated tavern with velvet curtains and wooden interiors, exploring both ground and upper floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior stone staircase against red plastered wall

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase alongside the red wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking up wide stone stairs with swords on his back, alongside a tall red stucco wall

entered.detail: tall weathered red plastered wall with rough texture
wide stone steps with decorative carved balustrades
ornate stone balustrade with rounded posts

segments.scene_description: The segment shows Geralt ascending an exterior stone staircase flanked by a tall red stucco wall on the right and stone railings on the left. The camera follows from behind as the character climbs toward a bright terrace opening visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace dining area with panoramic lake and mountain views

events.description: emerges from enclosed stairwell onto bright sunlit rooftop terrace
character turns right to walk along terrace edge overlooking the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking around the terrace, examining the dining tables and enjoying the scenic views of the lake and mountains

notable_agents.action: man sitting at wooden table eating and drinking

entered.detail: long wooden banquet table set with fruit platters and goblets
stone balustrade overlooking the terrace edge
large terracotta pots with blooming pink roses
blue lake with distant shoreline and mountains
decorative stone arch containing a religious figure statue
wooden privacy screen with climbing vines

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto a spacious sunlit rooftop terrace decorated with dining tables, potted roses, and ornate stone railings. The terrace offers panoramic views of a blue lake and distant mountains. The character walks around examining the setup, passing a seated man at one of the tables, with warm afternoon light illuminating the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor tavern interior with bar and checkered flooring

events.description: enters building from terrace through heavy red velvet curtains
lighting shifts from bright sunlight to dim candlelit interior atmosphere

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the ground floor tavern, passing the bar area and approaching the staircase

notable_agents.action: barkeeper standing behind the wooden counter

entered.detail: heavy draped curtains marking the entrance from the terrace
dark polished wood bar with bottles and glasses
black and white diamond pattern marble tiles
wooden staircase with carved railings leading to upper floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit tavern interior through heavy red curtains, transitioning from bright sunlight to candlelight. The space features a checkered marble floor, wooden bar counter, and wall sconces. Geralt walks past the bar where a barkeeper stands, heading toward a wooden staircase at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor private chambers with leaded glass windows and oil paintings

events.description: ascends wooden staircase from ground floor to upper level
approaches leaded glass window with view of exterior greenery

agents.ego_description: Geralt exploring the upper floor rooms, examining oil paintings and looking out the diamond-paned windows

notable_agents.action: elderly man sitting at a desk reading or writing

entered.detail: framed portraits hanging on wood-paneled walls
diamond-paned windows with red curtains overlooking trees
four-poster bed with heavy red drapes
tall carved wooden cabinet with metal fittings

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends to the upper floor and explores furnished private chambers. The rooms feature oil paintings on wood-paneled walls, leaded glass windows with views of greenery, and a four-poster bed. The character walks past an elderly man seated at a desk, examining the room's details including a large wooden wardrobe and red patterned carpets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open-air Mediterranean terrace into the intimate, dimly lit interiors of a multi-story tavern. It begins with Geralt ascending an exterior stone staircase flanked by a red stucco wall, climbing toward a brilliant light at the top. As he emerges onto the spacious rooftop terrace, the scene opens up to panoramic views of a blue lake and distant mountains under warm afternoon sunlight. The camera then follows him through heavy red curtains, shifting abruptly from the glare of the outdoors to a candlelit interior featuring checkered marble floors and a wooden bar. Finally, the movement carries him up a wooden staircase and into private upper chambers, where the environment settles into a quiet space of wood-paneled walls, oil paintings, and red patterned carpets.
